components.name: trivy
components.description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more. This is a custom wrapper maintained by the cdxgen team.

components.name: trustinspector
components.description: cdxgen trust-material inspection helper for repository keys, certificate stores, macOS code-signing, notarization, and Windows trust policy inventory.

annotations.text: This Cryptography Bill-of-Materials (CBOM) document was created on Friday, June 19, 2026. The xBOM tools used are: trivy, trustinspector, and cdxgen. The lifecycles phases represented are: pre-build and post-build. The document describes a container named 'tomcat'. There are 158 cryptographic assets listed under components in this CBOM. There are 158 components. The linux image uses the amd64 architecture and has the registry tag tomcat:latest. The OS components are of types deb, noble, ubuntu, and ubuntu-24.04.
